trends.title: The more tattooed skin someone has, the stronger certain personality traits may be
trends.originalTitle: The more tattooed skin someone has, the stronger certain personality traits may be
trends.summary: A community study of 280 adults in Cyprus examined whether tattoo presence and tattooed body surface area (tBSA) are associated with maladaptive personality traits. Tattooed individuals showed higher Disinhibition, while greater tattoo coverage was modestly linked to Antagonism and Disinhibition.

trends.title: Americans expect gasoline prices to keep rising after Iran strikes, Reuters/Ipsos poll finds
trends.originalTitle: Americans expect gasoline prices to keep rising after Iran strikes, Reuters/Ipsos poll finds
trends.summary: WASHINGTON, March 9 - Most Americans think gasoline prices are going to rise in coming months following President Donald Trump's decision to launch military strikes on Iran, and many expect a protracted conflict, according to a Reuters/Ipsos poll that closed on Monday.
